title: coreopsis integrifolia
intro: Coreopsis integrifolia, also known as the entireleaf coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to the prairies and dry woods of the United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its flowers, leaves, and roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of consuming Coreopsis integrifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis integrifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin irritations.
